name: 04_weight_exactly_threshold_resets
description: Branch 2 (gate fails): valid_vwap_weight EXACTLY 0.5 fails the strict `>` gate, so both tick counters reset to 0, both broken False.
derivation: Outer guard passes (is_triggered=False). Inner gate: `valid_vwap_weight > VWAP_WEIGHT_THRESHOLD(0.5)` -> 0.5 > 0.5 is FALSE (strict greater-than). Gate fails -> producer's else-branch sets BOTH ticks to 0 unconditionally. Returns (0, 0, False, False). Boundary case: confirms the gate uses `>` not `>=`.
